function.message: I found two Filamenthütte Wien charges for 'PLA spool mixed colors' (72 and 24), and none dated around 2026-01-10 (51 days before 2026-03-02), so I can’t determine a single correct number without clarification.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied date anchoring to context date and clarification rule to avoid guessing when multiple/non-matching records exist.
function.outcome_justification: From context date 2026-03-02, 51 days ago is 2026-01-10. The only files containing the exact line item are dated 2025-11-12 (line_eur 72) and 2026-03-03 (line_eur 24). The nearby Filamenthütte record dated 2026-01-04 does not contain that line item.
